kernel.note: 2 release JSON files have BOM encoding errors preventing parse. Only delegation-proposal is signed.

archivist.note: All messages predate signing infrastructure. No v1.2 messages in outbox.

library.note: act-round-001 is signed. 3 non-schema files (gate-result, protocol-ack, test-001) are not inbox messages.

swarmmind.note: 3 different key_ids observed — key rotation in progress. Unsigned messages include key-reconciliation alerts which should have been signed.

risk_assessment.reason: 90.2% of outbound messages lack cryptographic signatures. Under enforce mode, these messages would be expired by recipient watchers. Historical messages predate signing infrastructure but all NEW messages must be signed.
risk_assessment.required_action: All lanes must sign all outbound messages via sign-outbox-message.js or create-signed-message.js before delivery.

convergence_gate.claim: 9.8% signing compliance across 4-lane outboxes — insufficient for enforce-mode operation
